But SPARQL may not allow sub-sub-selects.

Alternatively, use conditional aggregation:

SELECT 
  ( (SUM(CASE WHEN ?club = wd:Q1084121 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
     SUM(CASE WHEN ?club = wd:Q251090 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
     SUM(CASE WHEN ?club = wd:Q2521385 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) 
    - SUM(CASE WHEN ?club = wd:Q249679 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
  AS ?difference)
WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P1346 ?club .
  ?season wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q19840852 .
  FILTER (?club IN (wd:Q1084121, wd:Q251090, wd:Q2521385, wd:Q249679))
}
